profile.name: Reajul Islam Robin
profile.headline: I build backend systems, APIs, and business applications with a focus on maintainability, clean architecture, and production-ready software.
profile.summary: Backend-focused engineer working with .NET, C#, SQL, Angular, and modern application patterns. Interested in systems that remain understandable after deployment—not only during development.
profile.education: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science & Engineering · Mawlana Bhashani Science & Technology University

achievements: Designed and maintained backend APIs supporting business workflows, validation, authorization, and error handling.
Worked with relational databases and service-layer abstractions to improve maintainability and query performance.
Built backend features for production applications while collaborating across frontend and backend teams.
Built full-stack applications using authentication, reusable services, and API-driven interfaces.
Created repeatable development workflows using containers and deployment pipelines.
Focused on maintainable architecture and separation of concerns.

projects.name: Healthcare Prescription & Telemedicine API
projects.description: Comprehensive .NET backend service designed for prescription management and telemedicine workflows within a healthcare platform.
highlights: Designed microservices architecture for prescription and telemedicine workflows.
Implemented JWT-based authentication with role-based access control.
Used Redis for caching and session management to reduce database load.
Modeled healthcare domain entities with attention to data integrity and audit trails.

projects.name: PetCare AI Platform
projects.description: Pet healthcare platform integrating AI-powered triage workflows using retrieval augmented generation for symptom analysis and information retrieval.
highlights: Architected backend APIs for AI-powered symptom triage and information retrieval.
Integrated RAG pipeline for context-aware responses based on veterinary knowledge base.
Built Angular frontend for pet owners to describe symptoms and receive guidance.
Designed data models for pet profiles, medical history, and consultation records.

projects.name: DSA Practice Platform
projects.description: Problem-solving platform designed for structured coding practice through chapter-wise puzzles, quizzes, and guided workflows.
highlights: Built chapter-wise problem organization with progressive difficulty tracking.
Implemented quiz system with scoring, hints, and solution validation.
Designed REST APIs for problem CRUD, submission evaluation, and progress persistence.
Added JWT authentication with user progress tracking across sessions.

music.title: Giorgio by Moroder
music.note: Long-form, patient, systems-brain music for deep work.

book.title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
book.creator: Martin Kleppmann
book.note: A grounding book for thinking clearly about data, tradeoffs, and reliability.

movie.title: The Social Network
movie.creator: David Fincher
movie.note: Sharp, fast, and a reminder that software is always tangled with people.
